# ZipDownloadsManager

Access via `client.NewClient().ZipDownloads`.

## Create

`POST /zip_downloads`

**Request body** (`application/json`): `ZipDownloadRequest`

**Returns:** `ZipDownload`

**Example**

```go
result, err := client.ZipDownloads.Create(context.Background(), &schemas.ZipDownloadRequest{})
if err != nil {
	log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Println(result)
```
